mapper.select: select (select count(1) from user_info) as total_user_count, (select count(1) from user_info where date(create_time) = curdate()) as today_new_user_count, (select count(distinct user_id) from music_creation where date(create_time) = curdate()) as active_creator_count, (select count(1) from music_creation) as total_creation_count, (select count(1) from music_creation where date(create_time) = curdate()) as today_creation_count, (select count(1) from music_info) as total_music_count, (select count(1) from music_info where music_status = 1) as success_music_count, (select count(1) from music_info where date(create_time) = curdate() and music_status = 1) as today_success_music_count, (select count(1) from music_info where music_status = 0) as creating_music_count, (select count(1) from music_info where music_status = 2) as failed_music_count, (select count(1) from music_info where publish_status = 1) as published_music_count, (select count(1) from music_info where publish_status = 0 or publish_status is null) as draft_music_count, (select count(1) from music_info where publish_status = 2) as hidden_music_count, (select cast(ifnull(sum(play_count), 0) as signed) from music_info) as total_play_count, (select cast(ifnull(sum(good_count), 0) as signed) from music_info) as total_good_count, (select count(1) from music_cover_creation) as total_cover_task_count, (select count(1) from music_cover_creation where status = 1) as success_cover_task_count, (select count(1) from music_cover_creation where date(create_time) = curdate()) as today_cover_task_count, (select count(1) from music_creation where prompt_source_type = 1) as ai_prompt_count, (select count(1) from music_creation where ifnull(prompt_source_type, 0) = 0) as manual_prompt_count, (select count(1) from music_info where cover_source = 1) as ai_cover_music_count, (select count(1) from music_info where ifnull(cover_source, 0) = 0 and cover is not null and cover != '') as manual_cover_music_count, (select cast(abs(ifnull(sum(change_integral), 0)) as signed) from user_integral_record where change_integral < 0 and record_type in (1, 5, 7) and date(create_time) = curdate()) as today_integral_consume, (select cast(ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as decimal(12, 2)) from pay_order_info where status = 1 and date(pay_time) = curdate()) as today_recharge_amount

select date_format(d.stat_day, '%Y-%m-%d') as trend_date, (select count(1) from user_info u where date(u.create_time) = d.stat_day) as new_user_count, (select count(1) from music_creation c where date(c.create_time) = d.stat_day) as creation_count, (select count(1) from music_info m where date(m.create_time) = d.stat_day and m.music_status = 1) as success_music_count, (select count(1) from music_info m where date(m.publish_time) = d.stat_day and m.publish_status = 1) as publish_count, (select count(1) from music_cover_creation mc where date(mc.create_time) = d.stat_day) as cover_task_count, (select cast(abs(ifnull(sum(change_integral), 0)) as signed) from user_integral_record where change_integral < 0 and record_type in (1, 5, 7) and date(create_time) = d.stat_day) as integral_consume, (select cast(ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as decimal(12, 2)) from pay_order_info where status = 1 and date(pay_time) = d.stat_day) as recharge_amount from ( select date_sub(curdate(), interval 6 day) as stat_day union all select date_sub(curdate(), interval 5 day) union all select date_sub(curdate(), interval 4 day) union all select date_sub(curdate(), interval 3 day) union all select date_sub(curdate(), interval 2 day) union all select date_sub(curdate(), interval 1 day) union all select curdate() ) d order by d.stat_day asc

select ifnull(nullif(trim(c.model), ''), '未设置') as model_name, count(1) as total_count, cast(ifnull(sum(case when m.music_status = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as signed) as success_count from music_creation c left join music_info m on m.creation_id = c.creation_id group by ifnull(nullif(trim(c.model), ''), '未设置') order by total_count desc, success_count desc, model_name asc limit #{limit}

select m.music_id, m.music_title, m.cover, cast(ifnull(m.play_count, 0) as signed) as play_count, cast(ifnull(m.good_count, 0) as signed) as good_count, m.publish_time, u.nick_name from music_info m left join user_info u on u.user_id = m.user_id where m.music_status = 1 and m.publish_status = 1 order by m.good_count desc, m.play_count desc, m.publish_time desc, m.create_time desc limit #{limit}

select u.user_id, u.nick_name, u.avatar, count(1) as music_count, cast(ifnull(sum(m.play_count), 0) as signed) as total_play_count, cast(ifnull(sum(m.good_count), 0) as signed) as total_good_count from music_info m left join user_info u on u.user_id = m.user_id where m.music_status = 1 and m.publish_status = 1 group by u.user_id, u.nick_name, u.avatar order by total_good_count desc, total_play_count desc, music_count desc, u.nick_name asc limit #{limit}
